source_jobs.title: AI Research Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

We’ve surpassed 3 million users across 18,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Applovin, Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.




ABOUT THIS ROLE

We're hiring an AI Research Engineer. We're open to professionals with a few years of experience and ambitious new graduates. In this role, you'll work closely with our Chief AI Scientist and other researchers to develop and shape Creatify's industry-leading AI video ad models.

This is a full-time, in-person position based in Mountain View, CA.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Participate in the entire lifecycle of AI projects, from problem definition to deployment.

 - Develop and implement LLM and multimodal models, experimenting with novel algorithms and techniques.

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI solutions into our products and services.

 - Contribute to research that can be published in top-tier conferences.
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Having a Master or Ph.D. degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or a related field.

 - Strong foundation in algorithms, linear algebra, statistics, and machine learning principles.

 - Strong coding skills in Python and ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch).

 - Curiosity and a strong desire to learn and tackle challenging problems.

 - Excellent communication skills, with the ability to work well in a team environment.

 - Last but not least, you are genuinely a nice person.

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

source_jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

We’ve surpassed 3 million users across 18,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Applovin, Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.




ABOUT THIS ROLE

We’re hiring a Machine Learning Engineer to design and scale advanced models and systems for prediction, recommendation, and generative AI. In this role, you’ll work on large-scale applied ML problems, build state-of-the-art solutions, and mentor junior engineers while occasionally leading projects.

This is a full-time, in-person position based in Mountain View, CA.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Research, design, develop, and test operating-systems–level software, compilers, and network distribution software for massive social data and prediction problems.

 - Bring extensive industry experience across ranking, classification, recommendation, and optimization problems (e.g., payment fraud, CTR/CVR prediction, click-fraud detection, ads/feed/search ranking, text/sentiment classification, collaborative filtering/recommendation, spam detection), or expertise in modern generative and foundation model approaches (e.g., LLMs, transformers, diffusion models).

 - Tackle large-scope problems; develop highly scalable systems, algorithms, and tools leveraging deep learning, data regression, and rules-based models.

 - Suggest, collect, analyze, and synthesize requirements and identify bottlenecks across technology, systems, and tools.

 - Build solutions that iterate quickly, efficiently leverage orders of magnitude more data, and explore state-of-the-art deep learning techniques.

 - Demonstrate strong engineering craft and operate with minimal guidance while mentoring junior engineers.

 - Apply advanced ML methods to fully exploit modern parallel environments (e.g., distributed clusters, and GPU).

 - Lead small teams or projects where necessary, providing technical guidance, code reviews, and architectural direction.
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Bachelor’s degree (or foreign equivalent) in Computer Science, Engineering, Applied Sciences, Mathematics, Physics, or a related field.

 - 4+ years of industry experience in software engineering or applied machine learning roles (E5+ or equivalent).

 - Proven track record of delivering large-scale systems and solving complex applied ML problems in production.

 - Prior experience in a tech lead (TL) capacity, such as driving technical direction, mentoring teammates, or coordinating cross-functional projects.

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

source_jobs.title: Product Manager Intern
source_jobs.description:
About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

We’ve surpassed 3 million users across 18,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Applovin, Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Work side-by-side with engineering to define requirements, prioritize features, and ship AI-powered product improvements on tight timelines.

 - Write clear PRDs, specs, and user stories that help the team build the right thing, fast.

 - Conduct user and market research to inform product decisions—talk to customers, analyze usage data, and study the competitive landscape.

 - Track project progress, remove blockers, and keep cross-functional workstreams organized and on schedule.

 - Contribute to product strategy by surfacing insights on AI model capabilities, marketing workflows, and user pain points.

 - Move fast, stay organized, and operate with the intensity of a founding team member.


WHO YOU ARE

 - Recent graduate or current MBA candidate with a strong drive to break into product management at a high-growth startup.

 - Exceptionally organized—you bring structure to chaos and nothing slips through the cracks.

 - Genuinely passionate about AI: you follow model releases, experiment with tools, and have opinions about where the space is headed.

 - Deeply curious about the marketing and advertising space—you understand (or want to understand) how brands create, test, and scale ad creative.

 - Strong communicator who can translate between technical and business audiences with clarity.

 - Comfortable with high intensity and fast pace—you don’t wait to be told what to do.

 - Bonus: ex-consulting experience (MBB or similar)—you know how to structure ambiguous problems and drive to answers quickly.

 - Bonus: technical background or comfort reading code, APIs, and data.


WHY CREATIFY

 - Real ownership from day one—you’ll ship features, not fetch coffee.

 - Learn product management at the intersection of AI and advertising, two of the fastest-moving spaces in tech.

 - Series A momentum with real revenue, real users, and a team that moves at startup speed.

 - A launchpad for your PM career—top performers have a path to a full-time role.

Ready to ship AI products that thousands of marketers use? Apply now.

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

We’ve surpassed 3 million users across 18,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Applovin, Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.



About the Role

Creatify is seeking a full-time Product Designer to support our design team in creating intuitive, high-quality user experiences across our platform.

The intern will work closely with product managers, engineers, and designers to contribute to design projects including product features, internal tools, and marketing assets.

This role is intended to provide hands-on learning experience in a fast-paced startup environment while contributing to real product development.

 - Start Date: prefer to start as soon as possible, this is not a cohort based role.

 - Work Authorization: Candidates must be authorized to work in the U.S. We welcome applicants eligible under OPT.
   
   

Responsibilities

 - Support and help elevate the end-to-end user experience across Creatify—from product structure to final polish

 - Design clean, thoughtful interfaces for creative tools and workflows

 - Contribute to building our design system and visual language (typography, spacing, motion, components)

 - Assist in designing experiences for video editing, AI avatars, campaign workflows, and asset management

 - Collaborate closely with engineers to bring designs to life with high fidelity

 - Participate in user research and develop an understanding of user needs and creative workflows

 - Pay close attention to detail and contribute to delivering polished, high-quality design work
   
   

Qualifications

 - Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Design, HCI, or a related field (or equivalent experience)

 - Strong visual design fundamentals (typography, layout, color, spacing)

 - A portfolio demonstrating thoughtful design work and attention to detail

 - Ability to simplify complex ideas into clear, intuitive experiences

 - Strong interest in product design, user experience, and craft

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced, early-stage environment
   
   

Bonus Points

 - Experience designing for creators, marketers, or adtech tools

 - Familiarity with motion design, timelines, or animation interfaces

 - Exposure to design systems or component libraries

 - Strong opinions on what makes great creative—and great tools

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.




ABOUT THIS ROLE

Creatify is seeking a full-time Software Engineering Intern (Full-Stack) to support our engineering team in building and improving our AI-powered video advertising platform.

The intern will work closely with engineers, product managers, and designers to contribute to real product features across both frontend and backend systems.

This role is intended to provide hands-on learning experience in a fast-paced startup environment while contributing to production-level code and systems.

 - Start Date: prefer to start as soon as possible, this is not a cohort based role.

 - Work Authorization: Candidates must be authorized to work in the U.S. We welcome applicants eligible under CPT or OPT.




RESPONSIBILITIES

You will be responsible for creating responsive web designs, coding frontends and backends, and collaborating with PMs and designers to deliver features.




QUALIFICATIONS

 - Proficiency in React, Python, and frameworks like Django or Flask.

 - Familiarity with Docker, SQL, and cloud services like AWS, GCP, or Azure.

 - Previous experience in video, ads, AI is a significant plus.

 - Fast-paced work style. We operate at a high speed, and so should you.

 - Excellent communication, teamwork skills, and problem-solving ability.

 - A genuinely nice person.

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

source_jobs.title: Creative Director, Performance Advertising
source_jobs.description:
About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

We’ve surpassed 3 million users across 18,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Applovin, Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own creative strategy for paid social video ads across Meta, TikTok, and YouTube—focused on CTR, CPA, and ROAS.

 - Develop ad concepts from scratch: hooks, angles, narratives, and formats built for rapid testing and iteration.

 - Write platform-native scripts that feel conversational and built for the scroll—not the boardroom.

 - Manage and mentor a small, high-output creative team—setting the bar for quality, speed, and ambition.

 - Be the creative face of Creatify to key clients: present strategies, pitch concepts, and build trust as a strategic partner.

 - Design AI-powered workflows that supercharge production speed, creative variation, and testing cycles.

 - Build repeatable creative frameworks and playbooks that enable the team to produce ads at scale.

 - Use performance data to scale winners, kill underperformers, and iterate fast.


WHO YOU ARE

A hands-on creative leader equally comfortable whiteboarding concepts, jumping into CapCut, or prompting an AI model. Builder energy, not manager energy.

 - 3+ years in creative direction, paid social advertising, or agency-side performance creative.

 - Strong conceptual thinker—you instinctively know what hooks and messaging drive action.

 - Deep fluency in social-first ad formats and real user behavior on major platforms.

 - Data-aware: you use metrics to guide creative decisions, not just gut instinct.

 - Systems thinker who designs scalable frameworks, not one-off executions.

 - Excellent communicator who can present to clients, rally a team, and make complex ideas accessible.

 - Experience managing creative teams in fast-paced, deadline-driven environments.

 - Bonus: ex-creative agency owner or co-founder—you know what it takes to build a creative operation from the ground up.


AI & TOOLS

 - Hands-on with AI creative tools (Veo3, Sora2, Kling, or similar) and skilled at turning them into repeatable production workflows.

 - Strong AI prompting intuition—you know which formats consistently produce usable, high-quality results.

 - Proficient with Premiere, After Effects, CapCut, or equivalent.


WHY CREATIFY

 - Shape the creative playbook at a company redefining how ads are made—your fingerprints will be everywhere.

 - Series A momentum with real revenue, real customers, and massive market opportunity.

 - Work at the bleeding edge of AI + advertising with access to tools before most people know they exist.

 - Small team, big ownership—every idea has a real shot at shipping.

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at ou

This is a full-time, in-person position based in Mountain View, CA.




RESPONSIBILITIES

As a Senior Full-stack Developer at Creatify, you'll be responsible for creating responsive web designs, coding frontends and backends, and collaborating with PMs and designers to deliver features. This is a full-time and in-person role, based in Mountain View, CA.

source_jobs.description:
About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

We’ve surpassed 3 million users across 18,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Applovin, Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Revenue Operations Manager to own our B2B revenue data and collections. You will be the operational backbone of our SLG team - ensuring our pipeline is clean, revenue is accurately tracked and collected, and every GTM motion is connected into one clean view of the business. You'll own both the operational and financial sides of our SLG revenue engine.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Finance & Billing Operations

 - Own accounts receivable end-to-end — invoice generation, payment collection, and overdue tracking

 - Own Stripe and billing system reconciliation

 - Calculate and process commission payouts monthly and quarterly for AEs, SDRs, CSM, BD, and referral partners

CRM & Pipeline Operations

 - Own HubSpot end-to-end — data hygiene, workflows, automations, full funnel reporting, and attribution across all GTM motions — PLG, SDR, inbound, conferences, and partnerships — from first touch through closed won and expansion

 - Manage lead routing, PQL triggers, and SDR/AE handoff workflows

 - Build rep-level performance dashboards tracking quota attainment and pipeline coverage

Revenue Reporting & Metrics

 - Produce monthly SLG revenue metrics report — ARR, MRR, NRR, churn, and expansion

 - Maintain accurate pipeline forecasts and end-of-quarter reporting

Cross-functional Communication

 - Serve as the operational bridge across sales, marketing, and customer success

 - Ensure data across finance, CRM, and revenue reporting is accurate, connected, and accessible to leadership




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years in a RevOps, Sales Ops, BizOps, or SaaS finance role

 - HubSpot power user — has built workflows, automations, and full funnel reports from scratch

 - Detail-obsessed, especially around data accuracy and financial calculations

 - Strong communicator across functions — can translate systems and data into plain language for sales, marketing, and leadership

 - Thrives in ambiguity — can operate independently without heavy process already in place

 - Self/Starter & Startup Experience preferred

 - Bonus:
   
   - hands-on experience in accounts receivable, billing operations, or commission management
   
   - direct experience with Stripe or similar billing/payment systems
   
   - experience with sales engagement tools e.g. Zoominfo and data enrichment tools

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability statu

notes: High-tech startup with strong AI focus, multiple engineering roles, and recent funding.
